added.description: Hayley witnesses harsh working conditions at the CIA and encourages action.
added.title: (You Gotta) Strike for Your Right

added.description: Francine's dinner party goes awry when the mysterious Dinner Party Killer threatens it and the family.
added.title: Death by Dinner Party

added.description: Stan and Steve open up their own father-son garbage business after Stan inherits his father's old truck. Roger finds Hayley is a natural at bumper pool and brings her to play with the best player in town.
added.title: Garbage Stan

added.description: Stan deals with childhood issues of abandonment. Klaus starts a website to embarrass the Smith family about their fails.
added.title: Klaustastrophe.tv

added.description: Roger breaks up Steve's friendship with Snot, Barry & Toshi. Jeff realizes he has a flair for house flipping and gets Stan, Francine and Hayley involved.
added.title: Lost Boys

added.description: Francine becomes a conspiracy theorist. Klaus & Steve help Snot pimp out his new room.
added.title: Paranoid_Frandroid

added.description: Steve sets out to stop Roger after he joins a mysterious order. Francine buys a new pasta sauce and the family starts changing.
added.title: Shell Game

added.description: Hayley and Stan compete while collecting data for the US Census. Klaus inherits a camera and has Steve and his friends model for him.
added.title: The Census of the Lambs

added.description: Hayley becomes a town outcast after Stan ruins a town mural. Steve attends clown school.
added.title: The Mural of the Story

added.description: Roger becomes a marionette and injures other students to help Steve win the school talent show. Stan, Hayley and Klaus start their own local honey business.
added.title: The Talented Mr. Dingleberry

added.description: In an American Dad western, Stan is a wanted man hunted by Roger the bounty hunter. He ends up in a town in need of a good guy and helps Principal Lewis, Francine, Steve, and Hayley.
added.title: West to Mexico

added.description: Tina, Gene, and Louise strike it rich in the illegal snack business at school.
added.title: Snackface

removed.description: Linda agrees to drive Teddy to pick up Kathleen from her colonoscopy after he accidentally injures himself.
removed.title: Colon-ly the Dronely

removed.description: The family competes on the reality show The Bitchin' Race. After Stan and Hayley ditch the less-motivated Steve and Francine and team up, they end up in a Tunisian labor prison.
removed.title: The Bitchin' Race

removed.description: Steve becomes the town pariah after he convinces the star quarterback of the arena football team to stop playing. Roger forces Hayley to become a cab driver to pay him back for her gambling debts.
removed.title: Bazooka Steve

removed.description: Stan and Francine lose their memories and resort to primitive living on an island, Hayley and Jeff are rescued by the Navy and Jeff decides to enlist, and Roger and Steve try to survive on a lifeboat in the middle of the ocean.
